headline: Is Republic Services (RSG) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: For investors considering whether Republic Services at around US$210.04 a share offers value or appears expensive for its quality, this breakdown can help frame the stock through a valuation lens. The stock has moved 4.8% over the past week and 5.2% over the past month, while year to date it is roughly flat. The return over the last year is down 16.1%, compared with a 3 year return of 51.8% and a 5 year return of 104.3%. Recent coverage has focused on Republic Services as a large US waste...
